mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MD_DEVICE_ERROR_NOTI ( EQ_CODE, DEVICE_CODE, DEVICE_TYPE, DEVICE_NAME, ERROR_CODE, ERROR_DESC ) SELECT #{eqCode}, #{deviceCode}, #{deviceType}, #{deviceName}, #{errorCode}, #{errorDesc} WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM MD_DEVICE_ERROR_NOTI WHERE DEVICE_CODE = #{deviceCode} AND CLEAR_YN = 'N' )
mapper.update: UPDATE MD_DEVICE_ERROR_NOTI SET CLEAR_YN = 'Y', UPDATE_DATE = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE EQ_CODE = #{eqCode} AND DEVICE_CODE = #{deviceCode} AND CLEAR_YN = 'N'
mapper.select: SELECT SEQ, EQ_CODE, DEVICE_CODE, DEVICE_TYPE, DEVICE_NAME, ERROR_CODE, ERROR_DESC, CLEAR_YN, CREATE_DATE AS CREATE_DT, UPDATE_DATE AS UPDATE_DT FROM MD_DEVICE_ERROR_NOTI WHERE CLEAR_YN = #{clearYn} ORDER BY SEQ DESC
SELECT CFG_CODE_TYPE, ERROR_CODE, DEVICE_TYPE, ERROR_DESC, ERROR_LEVEL, NOTE FROM MD_DEVICE_ERROR_CODE_INFO
